questions.text: Find the solution of tan(x) = cot(x) for interval [0, 360]:
questions.subject: Mathematics

options.explanation: The correct answer is c) 45, 135, 225, 315. The equation tan(x) = cot(x) can be rewritten as tan(x) - cot(x) = 0, which is equivalent to sin(x) - cos(x) = 0.Solving this equation, we get the solutions: x = 45°, 135°, 225°, and 315°, which are the values in the interval [0, 360].

questions.explanation: The correct answer is c) 45, 135, 225, 315. The equation tan(x) = cot(x) can be rewritten as tan(x) - cot(x) = 0, which is equivalent to sin(x) - cos(x) = 0.Solving this equation, we get the solutions: x = 45°, 135°, 225°, and 315°, which are the values in the interval [0, 360].
